title: FUNC-SPRINT-86 — Agent session state y memoria operativa controlada
wave: Ola 11 — Multiagente, RAG, MCP y ecosistema
tests: historical sprint documentation tests synchronized with README/backlog current milestone
pass_criteria: AgentRuntime associates each agent run with a local session_id.
AgentSession state is local and inspectable through CLI.
Session state stores summaries and metadata only, not raw prompts or raw outputs.
Semantic memory and RAG remain disabled.
Invalid or missing sessions block safely.
block_criteria: Do not close if secrets are persisted without redaction.
Do not close if sessions can escape workspace boundaries.
Do not close if semantic memory or RAG is enabled.
Do not close if agent session inspect mutates source files.

risks.risk: Local session state grows without pruning.
risks.mitigation: Retention policy is documented; pruning is future work.

risks.risk: Sensitive data could be summarized into sessions.
risks.mitigation: Only summaries are stored and payloads are redacted.

risks.risk: Operational memory confused with semantic memory.
risks.mitigation: Manifest, docs and runtime flags mark semantic memory and RAG as disabled.
